items.title: What a dominant performance from the Minnesota Lynx, routing the Dallas Wings 100-76 to extend their win streak to eight.
items.author: Alexa Philippou
items.body_excerpt:
What a dominant performance from the Minnesota Lynx, routing the Dallas Wings 100-76 to extend their win streak to eight.

Olivia Miles was sensational yet again with 24 points, 7 rebs, 6 asts, 1 block & 1 steal

Lynx shot 54% from the floor, 50% (7-14) on 3s, 94% (17-18) on FTs

items.title: Magic. Kobe. Wemby. 🔥
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt:
Magic. Kobe. Wemby. 🔥

Victor Wembanyama (32p, 8r, 6a in Game 3) became the THIRD player age 22 or younger to record 30+ points, 5+ rebounds and 5+ assists in an NBA Finals game, joining Magic Johnson (1980) and Kobe Bryant (2001) 🤯

SAS (1-2) NYK Game 4 tips off Wednesday at 8:30pm/et on ABC.
